title: Episode 1 robot voice
wikitext:
[]: Episode 1 robot voice             Quote Post by Clover » Sat Apr 19, 2014 8:43 pm Watching episode 1 with headphones, I picked out a weird sound around the time Gendo is waking up Rei. It's mixed into the humming of his little balcony room and kind of sounds like a robot voice talking. Can anyone else hear this, or am I going insane? Does anyone know what it says?

[]:             Quote Post by KLVTZ » Mon Apr 21, 2014 6:04 pm For those curios, the time is at 16:44 . I can barely hear it. Most likely its sound from other intercoms. Remember, probably 2/3 of Nerv communicate via intercom and other forms of audible connections. For whatever they are saying, I highly doubt can be extracted.

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Mon Apr 21, 2014 9:15 pm KLVTZ wrote: For those curios, the time is at 16:44 . I can barely hear it. Most likely its sound from other intercoms. Remember, probably 2/3 of Nerv communicate via intercom and other forms of audible connections. For whatever they are saying, I highly doubt can be extracted.
